title: thalictrum minus subsp. montanum
intro: Thalictrum minus subsp. montanum, also known as meadow rue, is a perennial plant species belonging to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce swelling, relieve pain, and promote healing. Herbal preparations of meadow rue include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from minor skin irritations to more serious conditions such as eczema and acne.
